content.en:
Every time the Ultimate Ancient Sea was born, one or more Ultimate Realm Masters would be born, and these Ultimate Realm Masters were not surprised.

But more Nine Realms peak existences will fall here.

For many Nine Realms pinnacles, even with the Ultimate Ancient Sea Assist, the chance of breaking through is still not high, maybe less than half, or just over half of the chance.

At this time.

Ye Tian broke through to become the Ultimate Realm Master, and the Ultimate Realm Lord of the Blood Sea Ultimate System was gone.

Seeing that he was forcibly kicked out of this ultimate system path, the Nine Divisions Realm Lord let out a desperate roar: "No!"

He was too desperate, he had cultivated for countless years, and finally cultivated the Blood Sea Ultimate System to the realm of the Nine Blood Sea Ultimate Rules, and he also cultivated the Extreme System, the Ultimate Will was extremely strong, coupled with his accumulation, breaking through the Ultimate Realm Lord was undoubtedly a 100% thing.

But he never expected that there was another Nine Realms peak who took the lead in breaking through, making his countless years of penance come to naught.

Now, the path of the Blood Sea Ultimate System is impassable, unless Ye Tian falls.

But how can an Ultimate Realm Lord fall so easily!

He really wanted to take revenge, but in the face of an Ultimate Realm Lord, he was far from being an opponent now, how could he dare to retaliate.

Thereupon.

He came out of the Ultimate Ancient Sea.

When the Nine Divisions Realm Lord came out of the Ultimate Ancient Sea, an Ultimate 720 Realm Lord came to him, "Nine Divisions, you didn't break through?"

This Ultimate Realm Lord is the backer of the Nine Divisions Realm Lord, Tailing Jizun.

"Lord Tailing Jizun, my Blood Sea Ultimate System has been occupied by another Nine Realms Peak, and I can't break through!"

Kuji looked desperate.

"The Ultimate Realm Lord who has just broken through is the Blood Sea Ultimate System!!!

Tailing Jizun was extremely annoyed, who did this?

In the entire Sea of Dimensions, who doesn't know that the Blood Sea Ultimate System is the Dao of the Nine Divisions, this is a deliberate attempt to follow the Blood Sea Ultimate System.

But the latecomers came first, and he couldn't say anything.

At this time.

Many Ultimate Realm Lords were speculating about who the new Ultimate Realm Lord was.

......

"Blood Sea Ultimate System, could it be Ye Tian? Impossible, how long has he only cultivated the Blood Sea Ultimate System?"

The Giant Axe Extreme Venerable said secretly.

But it's not good to say, after all, Ye Tian is the most demonic Nine Realms peak he has ever seen, maybe he can really break through!

But since Ye Tian's Abyssal Star Ultimate System was consummated, the other party had left the Abyssal Star Body, and he didn't know anything about Ye Tian's situation.

But only one Ultimate Realm Lord was sure that it was Ye Tian who had broken through.

"Sure enough, Ye Tian Realm Lord has broken through to the Ultimate Realm Lord Realm, and he should continue to attack the Ultimate Realm Lord level of the second Ultimate System. Yinduo said with great dignity.

At this time.

Ye Tian was attacking the Abyssal Star Ultimate System, and after a period of time, the Abyss Ultimate System finally broke through again.

He left a trace at the end of the Abyssal Star Ultimate System and occupied the quota of this Ultimate System.

After that, he hit the Ultimate Realm Master Level of the Eternal Night Ultimate System again, and this time he still succeeded in breaking through.

Then, he began to attack the ultimate system of the extradimensional realm.

Just as he was impacting, he sensed the dense figure at the end of the Ultimate System of the Transcendent Realm, which he couldn't see clearly, but it was the figure of an Ultimate Realm Master.

"There are really a lot of Ultimate Realm Masters in the Transcendent Realm Ultimate System!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently, he continued to attack, and finally broke through.

In this way, he now has broken through to the Ultimate Realm Ultimate Realm, the Abyssal Star Ultimate System, the Blood Sea Ultimate System, and the Eternal Night Ultimate System.

Just as he was about to attack the Silver Light Ultimate System, the Ultimate Ancient Sea began to vibrate, a trace that was about to disappear.

"There's no way to break through here!"

Ye Tian said regretfully.

If he was given a little more time, he would be able to master the Ultimate Realm Master Realm of the Fifth Ultimate System.

Whoa!!

These Nine Realms pinnacles were occupied by others, so they failed to break through and did not fall.

As for the other Nine Realms Peaks, they all fell.

"It's a pity, this time there have been twenty-three ancient Nine Realm peaks that are qualified to attack the Ultimate Realm Lords!" some of the Ultimate Realm Masters lamented.

......

"Ye Tian Realm Lord, congratulations on your breakthrough!"

Yinduo congratulated.

"Thank you!"

Ye Tian smiled slightly.

The Giant Axe Extreme Venerable also came to congratulate him, and his attitude was very friendly.

Some other Ultimate Realm Masters also came over to say hello, but they didn't know that Ye Tian had mastered several Ultimate Realm Master systems.

After all, when you reach the Ultimate Realm Lord Realm, it is difficult to see through the other party.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian and Yinduo Jizun returned to the Void Heaven Palace.

After coming back, Yinduo Jizun said: "Ye Tian, when you reach the Ultimate Realm Lord Realm, everyone will choose a name, in the name of Jizun, what name do you choose?"

Ye Tian pondered for a moment before he said, "It's called the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable!"

"Yes!"

Yinduo Extreme Venerable immediately summoned the other two Ultimate Realm Masters of the Void Heaven Palace.

Destroy the Extreme Venerable!

Void River Extreme Honor!

What shocked Ye Tian was that Cang Xuan Jizun was very old, and his breath was very weak, as if he had been hit hard.

"I've seen the Cang Annihilation Extreme Venerable, the Void River Extreme Venerable!"

Ye Tian shouted.

"Wanfa Jizun is polite!"

The two Ultimate Realm Masters smiled.

Cang Annihilation Extreme Venerable saw Ye Tian's doubts and explained: "I look like I have been hit hard and almost fell, and now my life has been saved, but my combat effectiveness is not good, and my future is ruined." "

To be able to make an Ultimate Realm Lord suffer such a heavy blow shows how dangerous the original situation was.

Ye Tian didn't ask what exactly happened, and he would slowly find out in the future.

Yinduo Jizun said again: "We have a total of fifty-three Ultimate Realm Masters in our Multidimensional Territory, and we currently have four Ultimate Realm Masters in our Void Heaven Palace, which is considered the countdown, but our overall strength is not the weakest. "

Ye Tian guessed that the strength of Yinduo Extreme Venerable was extremely strong, and some of the Ultimate Realm Masters of the Ultimate Force were numerous, but the quality was not good, so naturally they couldn't beat the Void Heaven Palace.

"Yinduo Extreme Venerable, when you reach the Ultimate Realm Lord level, how should you practice after that?"

Ye Tian asked.

Yinduo Jizun said: "There are two directions of improvement, one is to specialize in cultivating an ultimate system, if you cultivate an ultimate system to the limit, the ultimate rules will continue to improve, and you can still be invincible." The second is to cultivate multiple ultimate systems, and each more ultimate system will increase its strength a lot, and it can also create a joint ultimate dimensional killing move. At present, in the Sea of Dimensions, the Ultimate Realm Masters who have cultivated multiple Ultimate Systems occupy the majority. "。
